notes: gtk3's version is ruby4-bundled-gems-suite.yml's ruby-gnome-version default, not a live RubyGems.org lookup.

Every other root is the real non-prerelease Gem::Version-maximal published version at derivation time, matching ruby4-bundled-gems-suite.yml's full runtime-gems default list (not just native-runtime-gems -- an earlier derivation run only covered the four native-runtime-gems roots, missing every pure runtime-gems default; corrected after diffing against manifest/R4L5-gem-manifest.json's real 31 shipped members).

Real finding this run: sqlite3 and ffi classify as native_pass_through, not native_self_contained as KnownNativeGems::KNOWN_GEMS previously assumed -- upstream now ships precompiled x64-mingw-ucrt builds matching Ruby 4.0's ABI. Confirmed by source trace: today's real runtime-bundle path already only repacks ox/curses through the classified GTK flow.

Equivalence checked directly against manifest/R4L5-gem-manifest.json: every one of its 31 real members, minus matrix/rexml (both RubyBundledGems.bundled? today), has an approval: approved entry in the resulting seed. Two extra approved gems beyond the manifest's own members (pkg-config, native-package-installer) are real build-time-only transitive dependencies of the gtk3 closure, not part of the shipped runtime bundle -- expected, not a gap.

msys2_packages is the legacy uniform GTK3/curses recipe (bin/derive_curated_gems_seed.rb's LEGACY_UNIFORM_GTK3_CURSES_PACKAGES), applied to all 12 native_self_contained entries -- static toolchain (Msys2Bootstrap::PACKAGES) and the stale mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-sqlite3 pin already removed, but this remaining 5-package list is still uniform across gems, not evidence-backed per-gem curation -- explicitly transitional, real decomposition deliberately deferred.

config/curated-gems.json's gem entries are sorted by name (CuratedGemsSeedBuilder#build), not root_plans insertion order -- real reproducibility fix, found in CodeRabbit review 2026-07-13: insertion-order-dependent JSON serialization would have broken exact content_digest reproducibility for logically-identical derivation runs.

PR D: RubygemsClient#latest_version formalized and unit-tested (three real shapes: pure, native with target-platform build, source-only native), this script now delegates to it instead of a local untested duplicate -- confirmed byte-identical output before/after.
